issues.description: Action should be 'RevealFromHand' or a deck-peek/arrange mechanic, not 'SearchDeck'. The effect reveals 5 cards from top of deck and arranges them—it does not search and add to hand.
Missing the 'arrange' or 'reorder' action. The card allows placing cards at top OR bottom in any order, which requires a reorder/arrange action, not a search.
DSL is missing the [Blocker] passive ability entirely. The card has two effects: Blocker (passive Counter ability) and On Play (search/arrange). Only On Play is represented.

suggestedDsl.description: Blocker: After opponent declares attack, may rest this card to make it the new target
Look at 5 cards from top of deck, place at top or bottom in any order
